channel.title: Semiotica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Semiotica

item.title: Presence in absentia: in memory of Göran Sonesson
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0150

item.title: Being is said in many ways
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0144

item.title: A semiotic lifeworld. Semiotics and phenomenology: Peirce, Husserl, Heidegger, Deleuze, and Merleau-Ponty
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0152

item.title: Symbolization and appresentational orders in lifeworldly meaning constitution
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0147

item.title: Embodied agentive habits: between sedimentation and ongoing ground
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0143

item.title: The lifeworld and the world of life: the concept of relevance and its foundation in organic nature
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0149

item.title: Rethinking lexical semantic fields: relevance and local holism
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0148

item.title: A case study of Eco’s notion of encyclopedia: the (ethno)racial lexicon and its semantic sphere
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0146

item.title: Historical narrative and enrichment of the meaningful horizon of cultural worlds
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0142

item.title: Exploring deceptions: cognitive strategies and dynamics in espionage
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0145

item.title: Missed encounters: what may be relevant for an AI is not for a human being
item.description: Article by Filippo Silvestri DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sem-2024-0151
